# Meno Dive Club

> Family-operated SSI Dive Center on Gili Meno, Indonesia. Established December 2018.
> We teach the SSI ladder of recreational diving from beginner Open Water through Divemaster,
> run guided fun dives on the thirteen named sites around Gili Meno, and offer Dive & Stay
> packages with local accommodations.

## Contact

- Email: info@menodiveclub.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +62 8786 4074156
- Location: Jl. Gili Meno, Pemenang, North Lombok Regency, West Nusa Tenggara, 83352, Indonesia
- Coordinates: -8.3559, 116.0623
- Website: https://menodiveclub.com
- Canonical host: https://www.menodiveclub.com
- Brand logo: https://www.menodiveclub.com/logo-menodiveclub.png

## Key facts

- Certifying agency: SSI (Scuba Schools International)
- Languages taught: English, French (primary); Indonesian and German part-time
- Maximum student-to-instructor ratio: 4:1
- Visibility: typically 12–25 m (best in dry season May–October)
- Minimum age: 8 (Scuba Rangers, pool only); 10 (Junior Open Water); 15 (Open Water Diver)
- Hyperbaric chamber: Mataram, Lombok mainland (~1 hour speedboat)

## Courses

- [Open Water Diver](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/open-water) — 3-4 days, beginner certification
- [Advanced Adventurer](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/advanced-open-water) — 2 days, build on Open Water
- [Stress & Rescue](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/rescue-diver) — 3-4 days, emergency response
- [Divemaster](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/divemaster) — 14+ days, professional certification
- [Specialty courses](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/specialty-courses) — Deep, Nitrox, Night, Photography
- [Eco-Scuba Diver](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/eco-scuba) — 2 days, conservation-focused
- [Refresher](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/refresher) — Scuba Skills Update for returning divers
- [Family Diving Package](https://menodiveclub.com/courses/family-package) — Multi-diver bundles

## Dive sites (all within 15 minutes of the harbour)

- [Turtle City](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/turtle-city) — Hawksbill and green turtles
- [Secret Reef](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/secret-reef) — Vibrant coral, abundant marine life
- [Meno Wall](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/meno-wall) — Vertical drop-off to 22 m, macro & turtles
- [Air Wall](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/air-wall) — Wall to 22 m, nudibranchs, photography
- [Hans Reef](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/hans-reef) — Famous for macro life and frogfish
- [Shallow Turbo](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/shallow-turbo) — Big schools of fusiliers
- [Deep Turbo](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/deep-turbo) — Sea mounds at 30 m, possible reef sharks, rays
- [Meno Slope](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/meno-slope) — Gentle slope, all levels
- [Bounty Wreck](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/bounty-wreck) — 30 m sunken platform, batfish
- [Bio Rock](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/bio-rock) — Artificial reef project, house reef
- [Halik Reef](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/halik-reef) — Sloping reef with many turtles
- [Shark Point](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/shark-point) — Sandy canyons, reef sharks, stingrays, turtles
- [Sunset Reef](https://menodiveclub.com/dive-sites/sunset-reef) — Easy coral slope, all levels

- Turtle diving Lombok
